# Generated Code Quality Standards — Index

**Auto-generated. Do not edit.**

This file is regenerated whenever source-folder files change (G-10).

## Status

The directory is currently empty (CL-02 created the structure; rule files are added in subsequent CLs via the migration of existing `rubric/RUBRIC.yaml` and via the population of new R/N/T rules in source folders).

## Format (once populated)

```
## <namespace>/ (<file count> files, <rule count> rules, <recommended count> recommended)
- [<file>.yaml](../<namespace>/<file>.yaml) — <source title> (last fetched <iso-timestamp>; <rule count> rules)
- ...

## Totals
- Source namespaces: 14 (plus _operator, _community, _meta)
- Source files: <count>
- Rules: <count>
- Recommended rules: <count>
- Sourced from registries: <STANDARDS-URLS count> STANDARDS + <COMPLIANCE-URLS count> COMPLIANCE + <PR-SOURCES count> PR = <total> distinct upstream sources
```

## Regeneration

The aggregator (G-5) detects source-folder changes via directory tree hash. On next plugin invocation, this file is regenerated with current counts and metadata.
